items.title: Man arrested in Ottawa allegedly participated in killing during Rwandan genocide
items.desc: Laruent Nduwayezu faces 16 immigration charges in Canada, where the RCMP say he has been living under an alias for the last three decades. Authorities in Rwanda said the 68-year-old participated in the killing of Tutsis in 1994.

items.title: US oil firms sign deals with Iraq to develop alternative shipping routes
